title: Bitdeer Technologies Group Earnings Information and Analysis
text: Bitdeer Technologies Group (NASDAQ:BTDR) earnings information and analysis. The company has demonstrated revenue growth acceleration driven by Bitcoin mining expansion and AI Cloud services emergence. Earnings have been negative in recent periods due to depreciation charges, seasonal power costs, and investments in new infrastructure. Adjusted EBITDA metrics provide better insight into operational profitability, showing the business generating positive cash generation despite GAAP losses. Q1 2026 represented an inflection point with AI Cloud services reaching $69 million ARR, positioning the company for margin expansion as AI revenue scales. The company faces near-term earnings headwinds from heavy depreciation on mining rigs and noncash charges, but management expects margin recovery through A4 deployment, seasonal power normalization, and AI Cloud scaling. Analyst estimates suggest the company could achieve profitability in 2027 as AI Cloud revenue becomes a more significant portion of total revenue. Bitcoin mining remains cyclical and dependent on network difficulty and Bitcoin prices, creating earnings volatility.
